verdict_reason: Critical resource leak in static SnsClient initialization and incomplete AC coverage for aggregateVersion ordering requirement.

todos.issue: SnsClient created in static block is never closed, causing a resource leak
todos.fix: Store the SnsClient as a static field or close it in a static cleanup block

todos.issue: messages() can return null; receiveMessages() should handle this case to avoid NPE
String literal 'trace-outbox-it-' appears 3+ times across test constants and test methods (S1192)
todos.fix: Extract as a private static final constant: TRACE_PREFIX = 'trace-outbox-it-'

todos.issue: Test publishUnpublishedEvents_shouldPublishAggregateVersionsInOrder does not assert message ordering by aggregateVersion as required by AC
todos.fix: Add assertion to verify aggregateVersion fields in payload: firstPayload.get('aggregateVersion').asInt() < secondPayload.get('aggregateVersion').asInt()
